## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, workflows, and technical updates.](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [20 articles ready for publication, pending CMS access and image creation](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [New content strategy includes Apple CMS vs. competitors and web agencies as a persona](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Workflows for article updates, audits, and metadata generation are being refined](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Strapi to provide branded templates for images; manual creation preferred for now](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Plans to update tags and metadata for older articles using automated workflows](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

## Topics

### CMS Access and Article Publication

  - [GrowthX team awaiting CMS access due to a bug preventing new admin user addition](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [20 articles ready for publication this week](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Victor to follow up with Maxime about fixing the CMS bug](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)

### Image Creation Process

  - [Strapi to provide branded templates for images (e.g., quotes, compilations)](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Manual image creation preferred over AI-generated for quality and brand consistency](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [GrowthX can provide image prompts to assist Strapi's designer](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Incorporating Apple CMS vs. competitors topics](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Adding web agencies as a persona for content templates](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Identifying 5 articles for refresh/updates](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Refining workflows for article updates and audits](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Metadata and SEO Elements

  - [GrowthX delivering articles with meta titles, descriptions, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Tags currently added manually, working on automating the process](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Category and related post workflows already implemented](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Plans to batch update past articles' metadata using SCM rush data](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### Tag Migration Project

  - [Goal: Migrate all articles published before August 28th from "blue box" tags to new "arrow" tags](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate possibility of creating a workflow for this migration](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)

### Quality Assurance

  - [Human review (Andrej) as the final step before publication to ensure quality and avoid issues like duplicate links](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victor to grant Andrej personal access to battle cards](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Strapi to create additional image templates for quotes and compilations](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [GrowthX to launch 20 articles once CMS access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [GrowthX to identify 5 articles for refresh by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Investigate workflow creation for batch updating past articles' metadata](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [GrowthX to look into possibility of tag migration workflow](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Implement a "safe word" system to indicate when participants are done presenting in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/o1fB9i4Bj2TQA_e5bk3NMnxAkwcBiPVa?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
